content:
I'm a web developer, and one thing I've noticed is that many people postpone building a portfolio because it takes time.
So I built a tool that generates one automatically.
I'd love feedback specifically from developers.

• How's the generated design?

• What features are missing?

• Would you ever recommend something like this?
Demo:
https://cv2folio.novion.one

  submitted by   /u/dhananjayharidas
[link]   [comments]
